name: Zuppa Inglase
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the zabaglione (custard) first. In a top part of a double boiler, break egg yolks and add granulated sugar. Beat until light lemon-colored and blended.
2. Add marsala to the mixture and beat thoroughly again.
3. Place the top of the double boiler on a pot with boiling water. Cook the mixture for about 5 minutes or until it begins to thicken, stirring constantly. Do not boil.
4. Set aside to cool.
5. Slice the sponge cake into three layers. Place one layer on a serving plate and pour 1/3 cup rum over it.
6. Cover with 1/3 of the zabaglione mixture.
7. Repeat for the second and third layers.
8. When thoroughly cooled, beat whipping cream with 2 tablespoons granulated sugar and spread over the cake.
9. Sprinkle with chopped glazed fruit.
10. Serve at room temperature.
